checks.description: When data_en is asserted for at least three consecutive clk_b cycles, dataout must equal the value captured in data_reg (which mirrors data_in) after the enable pipeline latency.
checks.pass_condition: dataout holds the captured data_in value for the duration that en_clap_two remains high, and does not change while en_clap_two is low.
checks.trigger_condition: When en_clap_two transitions high after a sustained data_en high period.

checks.description: For boundary values of data_in (0x0 and 0xF) with data_en high, dataout must reflect the same boundary value after the synchronization latency.
checks.pass_condition: If data_in is driven to 0x0 (or 0xF) while data_en stays high for the required cycles, dataout becomes 0x0 (or 0xF) once en_clap_two asserts.
checks.trigger_condition: When data_en is high and data_in is at a boundary value.
